title: 3 Facts About Time

segments.text: Time literally moves slower for your feet than for your head.
And it only gets stranger from here.
Time passes faster the higher you are above the Earth.
Six hundred million years ago, a single day on Earth was only twenty one hours long.
And one second is officially defined by the vibrations of a cesium atom.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Time runs slower at your feet than your head. Physics is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
